title: Torchkey
description: Adds a hotkey to place a torch from your hotbar.
body:
Adds a hotkey to place a torch from your hotbar.

Inspired by [The Middle Torch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-middle-torch) by [HenryLoenwind](https://www.curseforge.com/members/henryloenwind/followers), an excellent mod which sadly has not been updated since 2019.

This mod requires [Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252ffabricmc.net%252f) and the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
